purpose: Explicit truth strip for HEAD/worktree/SSE and warning counters.
truth_rules: No chip can display PASS when source value is null or stale.
Truth strip always preferred over decorative status cues.
accessibility_rules: Status chips include text labels and not color alone.
proof_requirements: Mapping between chip values and /api/state fields.
change_safety: Visual restyle cannot alter source binding semantics.
